summary: Event Timeline & Dashboard API testing complete. All 21 tests pass. New 'minimum battle loop' features verified: Timeline system traces reservations from OTA webhook to PMS booking in <1s (goal was <5s), Dashboard provides health score, failure counts, pipeline depth, connector status. FailureTracker and Timeline wiring verified in import_bridge_service and outbox_worker.
critical_code_review_comments: Timeline Writer uses fire-and-forget pattern correctly - write failures logged but never block main flow
FailureTracker properly wired into import_bridge_service.py and outbox_worker.py
Dashboard snapshot worker runs every 60s storing health trends in cp_health_snapshots collection
Health score algorithm uses weighted factors: critical failures (30%), high failures (20%), outbox health (15%), import health (15%), sync health (10%), ARI freshness (5%), security (5%)
Timeline indexes properly created on startup for entity, correlation, external_id, and stage_health queries
All three new routers registered in router_registry.py: ops_router, timeline_router, dashboard_router
seed_data_creation: Used existing simulated timeline data: EXELY-TEST-98765 (9 events, full pipeline), EXELY-STUCK-54321 (4 events, stuck at import_decided)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Event Timeline & Dashboard (Phase 5) is complete and tested. 21 API tests in test_timeline_dashboard_api.py cover: Dashboard API (5 tests: main, tenant-scoped, trends, connectors, pipeline), Timeline API (8 tests: external_id lookup success/stuck/not_found, correlation trace, search, search with filters, gaps detection, entity timeline), Existing Ops API regression (5 tests: overview, failures, outbox, imports, sync), Integration tests (3 tests: trace under 5s, dashboard consistency, tenant isolation). Test data: EXELY-TEST-98765 has 9 events (full pipeline received->confirmed), EXELY-STUCK-54321 has 4 events (stuck at import_decided with failure). Correlation ID 393fde19-3d64-469e-bdad-d2117f05ec49 traces the successful flow. Tenant ID 044f122b-87b5-480a-88b4-b9534b0c8c90 for tenant-scoped tests.
verified_endpoints: GET /api/ops/dashboard - Full system dashboard with health_score, health_grade, metrics, connector_status, pipeline, recent_failures
GET /api/ops/dashboard/trends?hours=24 - Historical trends with timestamps, health_scores, failure_counts, outbox_depths
GET /api/ops/timeline/external/{external_id} - Primary debug entry point (traces OTA reservation in <1s)
GET /api/ops/timeline/correlation/{correlation_id} - Full flow trace with entity_map
GET /api/ops/timeline/search - Search with filters (tenant_id, provider, entity_type, stage, status, from, to)
GET /api/ops/timeline/gaps - Stuck event detection with threshold_minutes
